title: Goniophlebium levigatum
taxonomy: Goniophlebium levigatum is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It is a part of the order Polypodiales and the class Polypodiopsida. The class Polypodiopsida is further divided into the subclass Polypodiidae. The subclass Polypodiidae includes families such as Polypodiaceae and Dryopteridaceae. This classification reflects the evolutionary relationships among ferns and their closest relatives.
uses: Goniophlebium levigatum has been reported to have various medicinal properties. The plant is traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions. Its leaves are used to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. Some studies suggest that Goniophlebium levigatum may have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Further research is needed to confirm the plant's medicinal uses and potential benefits.
